title: Big Globe Compat - BetterNether
description: This datapack adds compatibility between BetterNether and Big Globe.
body:
This datapack adds all biomes and structures from BetterNether to Big Globe's nether terrain generation.

Due to how BCLib/World Weavor takes over the World Preset selection, Big Globe is no longer the default preset, so make sure you select Big Globe during world creation.

Many of the biomes are pretty feature heavy, so generation will likely be slow, I highly recommend pregenerating the chunks.
Biomes that are basically the same have been combined into their similar match because there's not much of a reason to make "Wart Forest" and "Wart Forest Edge" when there's no biome edges to begin with. 
Below are the resulting biomes;

Bone Reef

Crimson Glowing Woods

Crimson Pinewoods

Flooded Deltas

Gravel Desert

Magma Land

Nether Grasslands

Nether Jungle

Nether Mushroom Forest

Nether Swampland

Old Warped Woods

Soul Plain

Sulfuric Bone Reef

Upside Down Forest

Wart Forest

**Sinytra Connector Users:** To set a spawn point at one of the respawn statues, you need 4 Glowstone blocks. If you try to set your spawn point without the Glowstone, it will disconnect you from the server/internal server. Fabric doesn't have this issue.
